# hetzner_ip (Data Source)

Reads details of a Hetzner IP address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_ip" "example" {
  ip = "203.0.113.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address.

### Read-Only

- `broadcast` (String) Broadcast address.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway address.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the IP is locked.
- `mask` (Number) CIDR notation.
- `separate_mac` (String) Separate MAC address, if assigned.
- `server_ip` (String) The server main IP this IP is assigned to.
- `server_number` (Number) The server ID this IP is assigned to.
- `traffic_daily` (Number) Daily traffic limit in MB.
- `traffic_hourly` (Number) Hourly traffic limit in MB.
- `traffic_monthly` (Number) Monthly traffic limit in GB.
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean) Whether traffic warnings are enabled.
